LABEL: UBLNAS
Description: update line number addresses for the current BASIC program
convert ascii at M to binary

LABEL: TOUPPERM
Description: read M to A, upcase A

LABEL: COMOUT
Description: output A to com/mdm file (wrapper & extra stuff around SND232)

LABEL: SCNEMP
Description: scan for an empty directory entry

LABEL: SCNEMP2
Description: scan for an empty directory entry, alt entry

LABEL: RESETFPS2
Description: The 100’s 2146 is really the equivalent of here

LABEL: AFTEREOF
Description: advance HL past end of file based on type

LABEL: AFTERCO
Description: advance HL past end of CO file

LABEL: AFTERBA
Description: advance HL past end of BA file (updates line addrs first)

LABEL: AFTERDO
Description: advance HL past end of DO file

LABEL: INR_A_RET
Description: INR A; RET; middle of INSTR
Reverse load single precision at M to DEBC

LABEL: D2H4Bup
Description: move the memory pointed to by DE to the memory pointed to by HL

LABEL: NLLCD
Description: send crlf to lcd if not CSRY 0

LABEL: CMPARE
Description: compare the buffer pointed to by DE to the buffer pointed to by HL

LABEL: INSCHR
Description: Insert a character into a text file

LABEL: LDIRBC
Description: Move the memory pointed to by HL to the memory pointed to by DE for BC, ascending

LABEL: LDDRBC
Description: Move the memory pointed to by HL to the memory pointed to by DE for BC, descending

LABEL: INITDVI
Description: perform external DVI initialization if it is present

LABEL: CHK232
Description: Check RS232 queue for pending characters LDA XONOFF_ENFLAG
Calculate address to save next RS232 character
send character in C to serial port

LABEL: SETBAUD
Description: set RS232 baud rate from H
Enable XON/OFF when CTRL-S / CTRL-Q sent

LABEL: WCASHDR
Description: write cassette header and sync byte

LABEL: BRKCHK
Description: Check if SHIFT-BREAK is being pressed
Set the display top line to zero for all LCD drivers

LABEL: ENLCD
Description: Enable LCD drivers after short delay

LABEL: PAUSE_C
Description: Delay routine - decrement C until zero

LABEL: INT1D
Description: set int to 0x1D - disable background task & barcode interrupts

LABEL: BOOTDVI
Description: Copy initialization code from DVI to E000h and execute

LABEL: DVISCMD
Description: send A to dvi control mailbox

LABEL: GLYPHS_LO
Description: GLYPHSLO LCD char generator shape table (20H-7FH)

LABEL: GLYPHS_HI
Description: GLYPHSHI LCD char generator shape table (80H-FFH)

LABEL: DVICODE
Description: Location of init code to be copied from DVI

LABEL: LINENO
Description: current executing BASIC line number, FFFF if no pgm

LABEL: CURBAS
Description: pointer to start of BASIC program

LABEL: TOPFIL
Description: end of top fil / DVI start of variable data pointer

LABEL: FNAME
Description: 8 (9?) bytes padded fname / current BA pgm / prog name if not run from menu nor typed on select line

LABEL: FX1
Description: unknown, possibly file size or other metadata

LABEL: CFNAME
Description: filename of last program loaded from tape

LABEL: ALTLCD
Description: start of ALT LCD buffer 0x0140 bytes

LABEL: COMBUF
Description: COM buffer 0x40 bytes (k85 addr seems sus, but "load COMBUF" above is clear)

LABEL: COMINCNT
Description: number of bytes waiting in serial buffer

LABEL: KC7
Description: 8 bits for space, del, tab, esc, paste, label, print, enter
8 bits for storing function key recognition
8 bits for storing shift, ctrl, grph, code, num, and caps lock.
DVI Disk BASIC code initializer value
